---
title: "Series Overview"
---

<img src="content/images/logo_lwg-long.png" alt="Logo for LegacyWorks Group" width="30%" align="right"/>

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

<br>


:::{.callout-tip icon="false" collapse="false"}
## {{< fa brain >}} Learning Objectives

After completing this series, participants will be able to:
:::

### Citing These Materials

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

## Course Structure

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Structure

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later

:::

## Course Scheduling

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2026-27 Schedule

| **Date** | **Series** | **Primary Instructor** |
|:-----:|:-----------------|:---------|
| Jan. 7, 2027 | 1. Facilitative Leadership Principles and Practices | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Carrie Kappel </span> |
| Feb. 4, 2027 | 2. Community Engagement Principles and Practices | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} TBA </span> |
| Mar. 4, 2027 | 3. Designing a Collaborative or Network for Success | <span style="color:#4AB2CB">{{< fa people-group >}} Carrie Kappel </span> |

:::

## Course Policies

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under construction; check back later
